nasb.text: “Indeed, who will have pity on you, O Jerusalem, Or who will mourn for you, Or who will turn aside to ask about your welfare?

esv.text: “Who will have pity on you, O Jerusalem, or who will grieve for you? Who will turn aside to ask about your welfare?

cnv.text: “耶路撒冷啊！誰會可憐你呢？ 誰會為你悲傷呢？ 誰會轉身向你問安呢？

ccb.text: “耶路撒冷啊，谁会同情你？ 谁会为你悲哀？ 谁会驻足向你问安？
